codeReview.summary: Feature implemented correctly with ConfidenceLevel enum, threshold zones at 0.3/0.6/0.8, and per-memory confidence queries via BetaPosterior and Procedure methods. Comprehensive tests cover threshold boundaries and zone transitions.

summary: mem-confidence-bayesian: PASS. Implementation adds ConfidenceLevel enum with 4 threshold zones (<0.3 deprecated, 0.3-0.6 uncertain, 0.6-0.8 probable, >0.8 confident) and confidence_level() methods on BetaPosterior and Procedure. All 43 procedural tests pass. This feature was not among the 6 blocking failures in synthesis.json.
